description: PLACEHOLDER scaffolding fixture — replace input.raw_markdown with a real paper's extracted markdown and expected.tables with a hand-verified comparison table before the score means anything. Cite the source paper (title, DOI) here.

input.raw_markdown:
# A Dietary Protocol for Reducing Colorectal Tumor Markers

**Authors:** Jane Doe, Alan Smith

## Abstract
We introduce a new dietary protocol. Our proposed method reduces tumor markers by 30%, compared to the standard-of-care baseline of Smith et al. 2020 which achieved 20%.

## Results
Our protocol: 30% reduction. Baseline (Smith 2020): 20% reduction.

tables.research_problem: Reducing colorectal tumor markers through dietary intervention

rows.paper_title: A Dietary Protocol for Reducing Colorectal Tumor Markers
